user_prompt: I need a diagram showing triangle PQR with P at (1, 2), Q at (3, 2), and R at (2, 4) on a coordinate plane. Draw a directed line segment from P going 4 units right and 2 units up, with an arrow at the tip showing the direction of translation. Then draw the translated triangle P'Q'R' in its new position. Label all six vertices and show the directed line segment clearly.
